response.justification: Bogdan Szabo has extensive experience with C++ (National Instruments) and strong problem-solving skills, but his recent roles focus heavily on JavaScript/TypeScript, Node.js, and web/mobile development rather than C++ or industrial automation systems. His lack of recent C++ cloud/industrial experience and no explicit mention of secure coding standards (IEC 62443) raise concerns for this role.
strengths: Proven high-performance systems development (low-latency apps, real-time metadata)
Active open-source contributions and technical leadership (GISCollective, workshops)
concerns: Limited recent C++ work (last major C++ role was 2014–2015)
No demonstrated experience with industrial automation protocols or IEC 62443
Primary focus on JavaScript/TypeScript ecosystems (Node.js, React) rather than C++
